race.description: April O'shea - The People's Champion Handicap (C1)
race.comment: POMPATUS (4) resumed with a bang after he accounted for a handy maiden field over 1500m at Newcastle. Gets map favours and looks set for a big campaign as he stretches out in trip. SNEAKY CHOICE (8) indicated she was near her top second-up with a fast finishing third over 1400m at this track in fast time. Can race a little closer from the gate and shapes as the main danger. HUSH HUSH (7) is a talented filly yet to finish out of the money in three career runs. Scored a dominant first-up victory here over 1300m, then up sharply in trip with a fighting second over 1600m at Gosford. Has further upside and no shock to see her win this. SUN WARRIOR (6) will go back again from the wide gate after disappointing as fav with a plugging eighth over 1400m at this track last start. Filter now and can run into the minor money.
